fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Displays the number of a time sheet. A number is assigned to each time sheet when it is created. You cannot edit the number.

fields.name: Time Sheet Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the time sheet that the comment applies to.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the line number that is assigned to an entry on a time sheet.

This field is used internally.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when you created a comment.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for a comment.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies the comment that relates to a time sheet or time sheet line.
